name: Blender Normal Map Texturing
description: Generate textures guided by Blender normal maps. Takes a normal pass from Blender and generates surface textures that respect the 3D geometry via ControlNet normal conditioning. Ideal for creating PBR-ready textures from 3D models.

requires_download.reason: No SD1.5 normal-bae ControlNet installed; no SDXL/Flux normal ControlNet alternative available

normal_image.description: Filename of the Blender normal pass render (RGB normal map)

prompt.description: Text description of desired texture (e.g., 'weathered stone texture, mossy cracks, photorealistic')

negative_prompt.description: Things to avoid in texture generation

controlnet_strength.description: Normal map ControlNet influence (0.0-1.0, higher = stricter geometry adherence)

notes.blender_setup: In Blender, enable the Normal pass in View Layer Properties > Passes > Data. Render to PNG with RGB channels. Use camera-space normals for best ControlNet compatibility.
notes.model_download: Download control_v11p_sd15_normalbae.pth from https://huggingface.co/lllyasviel/ControlNet-v1-1 and place in ComfyUI/models/controlnet/
